font_families.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

rules.prose: Use UI font (Inter) for standard labels and prose.
rules.mono: Use monospace ONLY for IDs, repo, branch, paths, JSON, code, run IDs, plan IDs, and pass IDs.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Compact technical UI, dense readable tables/lists. Reduce inconsistent borders and visual noise. Avoid excessive cards, shadows, gradients, and consumer SaaS polish. Operator-focused.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px max). Maintain a sharp, structural technical look.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: None. Rely on 1px borders (#1a1a1a or #1e1e1e) for layer separation.

page_headers.classes: flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-[#1a1a1a] bg-[#0e0e0e]

status_pills.classes: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium border

attention_pills.classes: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 animate-pulse

table_rows.desktop_classes: group border-b border-[#1a1a1a] hover:bg-[#111111] transition-colors text-sm

current_state_cards.classes: p-4 bg-[#111111] border border-[#1a1a1a] rounded-sm flex flex-col gap-2

right_inspector_panels.classes: hidden lg:flex flex-col w-80 lg:w-96 border-l border-[#1a1a1a] bg-[#0e0e0e] h-full overflow-y-auto

validation_panels.classes: bg-amber-500/5 border-l-2 border-amber-500/50 p-3 text-sm text-amber-100 flex flex-col gap-1

error_states.classes: bg-red-500/5 border border-red-500/20 p-4 text-sm text-red-200 rounded-sm flex flex-col items-start gap-2

empty_states.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center text-zinc-500 border border-dashed border-[#1a1a1a] rounded-sm

loading_states.classes: flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 p-4 text-sm text-zinc-500 animate-pulse

tables_to_stacked_rows.strategy: Convert tables to compact STACKED ROWS on mobile, not giant cards. Remove table headers, use flexbox to stack key data vertically while keeping status/IDs/primary actions visible in top-right or inline.
tables_to_stacked_rows.container_classes: flex flex-col border-b border-[#1a1a1a] p-3 gap-1 hover:bg-[#111111]
tables_to_stacked_rows.secondary_row: text-xs text-zinc-500 flex gap-2 flex-wrap items-center

inspector_and_details.strategy: Move right inspector/details into tabs, accordions, or bottom drawers on mobile. Avoid desktop side-panels.
inspector_and_details.tabs_classes: flex overflow-x-auto border-b border-[#1a1a1a] hide-scrollbar gap-4 px-4 bg-[#0e0e0e]
inspector_and_details.tab_item: py-2 text-sm text-zinc-400 whitespace-nowrap border-b-2 border-transparent focus:outline-none
inspector_and_details.drawer_classes: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 bg-[#111111] border-t border-[#1a1a1a] p-4 max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto rounded-t-sm shadow-xl

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute for stable testing (e.g., data-testid='plan-submit-btn')
